title: Wing Corkscrew Wine Bottle Opener with Bottle Stopper, Premium Corkscrew Cork and Cap Bottle Opener for Waiters Wine Enthusiast

Multiple Use: ideal for restaurant, bar or home for a romantic evening or just a casual drink; buy a durable wine bottle opener as a great hostess gift for your families or good friends

description: Product Description Ventdest Wing Corkscrew Wine Bottle Opener with Bottle Stopper! Made from durable stainless steel with a Zinc-alloy body, the corkscrew does not corrode, meaning you can have a long-lasting product. This corkscrew features a unique wing design that makes opening your favorite bottle of wine or champagne an easy task. Minimalist design Sharp and strong corkscrew Anti-slip Rubber Beer opener Multifunctional Wine and Beer Opener The exquisite screw can removes corks from most cork-stoppered bottles, including wine, olive oils, vinegars. The end can opens beer cap bottles efficiently. Easy to Use Place the wine corkscrew opener over the bottle, twist the handle to insert the auger into the cork, and watch the opener's wings rise. Thoughtful Design Mechanical Gear keeps screw stays centered of the corks and prevent slippage, open bottles with ease.
